content:
🌟 tookie-osint | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Discovering social media usernames across various websites based on a given input.
✨ Key Features: • Advanced OSINT information gathering • Finds social media accounts based on inputs • Simple-to-use UI • High performance (rewritten from scratch) • Optimized for Python 3.12
📖 Summary: Tookie-OSINT is an advanced Python-based tool designed for efficient information gathering, specifically focused on discovering social media accounts based on provided inputs. It aims to be user-friendly and highly performant, assisting new programmers and pentesters in the field of OSINT.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
